title: Bike stolen from apartment entrance
report_text: A resident reported a bicycle missing from the apartment entrance rack after 7:30 AM. The post includes frustration and repeated warnings, but no suspect details yet.
action_steps: Check locked storage and camera footage
Ask residents to verify bike-lock practices
Report confirmed details to building security
notes_edge_case: Contains emotional language and limited facts; should be filtered as a noisy but relevant report.

title: Possible duplicate post about same bike theft
report_text: Another post repeats the same stolen-bike story with similar details and adds a complaint about management. No new evidence is included.
action_steps: Merge with the original incident
Avoid showing as a separate alert
Retain one concise digest item
notes_edge_case: Duplicate/noisy entry for de-duplication logic.

title: Suspicious white van near playground
report_text: Two residents independently saw a white van circling near the playground around 9:45 PM. No plate number was captured. Community wants a warning.
action_steps: Increase lighting and patrol near playground
Ask witnesses for plate or route details
Notify local guardians and security desk
notes_edge_case: Actionable but still unverified; should be presented with caution.

title: Verified package thefts reported on 3 streets
report_text: Local authorities confirmed multiple package thefts on Elm, Pine, and Cedar streets between March 1 and March 2. Suspect description and delivery safety tips were shared.
action_steps: Use secure delivery lockers or timed delivery
Ask neighbors to collect packages promptly
Review camera coverage near entry points
notes_edge_case: High-confidence alert suitable for concise digest.

title: Fake electricity bill email asks for immediate payment
report_text: Several residents received an email claiming overdue electricity charges with a suspicious payment link. The sender domain is misspelled and the message pressures users to act now.
action_steps: Do not click the link or open attachments
Verify billing through the official website or app
Warn nearby contacts and report the email as phishing
notes_edge_case: Digital security alert with clear user action checklist.

title: Caller asked elderly residents to share OTP
report_text: A scam caller claimed to be from a bank and requested an OTP to 'reverse a suspicious charge.' One resident nearly complied before a family member intervened.
action_steps: Never share OTPs or PINs over calls
Hang up and call the bank using the official number
Add the number to a scam-block list
notes_edge_case: High-risk scam tailored for elderly users.

title: Possible fake Wi-Fi hotspot near coworking cafe
report_text: Remote workers reported an open Wi-Fi network with a very similar name to the cafe's official network. One user saw certificate warnings after connecting.
action_steps: Forget the network and reconnect only to verified Wi-Fi
Use a VPN on public networks
Ask venue staff to confirm the official SSID
notes_edge_case: Relevant to remote workers and local network security.

title: Home router still uses default password
report_text: A self-check prompt from the app shows the router admin password is still the factory default. No breach is confirmed yet, but the setup is risky.
action_steps: Change the router admin password
Enable WPA2/WPA3 and update firmware
Review connected devices
notes_edge_case: Preventive digital defense rather than incident response.

title: Scheduled power outage tonight
report_text: Utility notice confirms a 2-hour planned outage from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM for maintenance. No emergency is expected.
action_steps: Charge devices before 10 PM
Keep backup lighting ready
Save work before the outage window
notes_edge_case: Low-severity operational notice that should not trigger alarm.

title: Heavy rain may cause street flooding
report_text: Weather service advisory predicts heavy rain and temporary flooding near low-lying roads after 5 PM. The notice suggests avoiding underpasses.
action_steps: Avoid flooded roads and underpasses
Plan earlier travel or alternate routes
Keep emergency contacts reachable
notes_edge_case: Forecast-style alert with location-specific advice.

title: Rumor about break-ins without location
report_text: Someone posted that 'break-ins are happening everywhere tonight' but gave no street, time, or source. The message is highly emotional and shares no verifiable details.
action_steps: Mark as low-confidence rumor
Do not amplify without evidence
Request location and source before posting
notes_edge_case: Missing location and source; should be downranked or excluded.

title: Fake courier asked for cash and a one-time code
report_text: An elderly resident received a doorbell visit from a person claiming to be a courier. The person asked for a cash payment and a code to release the package.
action_steps: Do not share codes or cash at the door
Confirm package delivery using the official tracking page
Use a guardian call-back step before opening the door
notes_edge_case: Targeted scam with door-to-door social engineering.

title: Local coworking group reports credential leak
report_text: A coworking space says a third-party service used by members may have exposed login emails and hashed passwords. No card data is confirmed in the leak.
action_steps: Change reused passwords immediately
Enable multi-factor authentication
Watch for phishing messages referencing the service
notes_edge_case: Breach-related proactive defense checklist.

title: Loud noise confirmed to be construction
report_text: Several residents reported hearing bangs near Northgate Market. The municipality confirmed the source was scheduled construction and not an emergency.
action_steps: Mark as resolved false alarm
Suppress repeated reposts
Show reassurance in the digest
notes_edge_case: Useful for showing reduction of unnecessary anxiety.

title: Private guardian check-in: all safe
report_text: Encrypted update shared only with trusted guardians: the resident requested a calm check-in after hearing scam calls in the area. The resident is safe and does not need escalation.
action_steps: Notify trusted guardians only
Avoid sharing the update publicly
Keep the account privacy settings restricted
notes_edge_case: Privacy-first safe circle example.

title: Single vague post about 'dangerous area' with no details
report_text: One post says the whole market is dangerous, but the author provides no time, address, or event details and repeats the same warning three times.
action_steps: Treat as low-signal content
Ask for specifics before alerting others
Exclude from main digest unless corroborated
notes_edge_case: Classic venting / alarmist content to downrank.

title: Streetlights out on one block
report_text: Residents reported the lights on one block of Riverbend Avenue were out after sunset. The utility recorded a repair ticket and expects service restoration within 24 hours.
action_steps: Avoid dimly lit routes at night
Share the issue with local maintenance
Increase visibility while walking
notes_edge_case: Low-to-moderate safety issue, not a panic event.

title: Login alerts after unusual overseas attempt
report_text: A remote worker received login alerts from an unfamiliar country within minutes of a fake invoice email. The login was blocked by MFA, and no takeover occurred.
action_steps: Reset passwords for related accounts
Review recent login sessions
Keep MFA enabled and remove stale recovery methods
notes_edge_case: Near-miss incident with preventive value.

title: Scam message pretending to be a grandchild
report_text: An older resident received a message claiming a grandchild needed urgent money and asked for secrecy. The wording was vague and the number was not saved in contacts.
action_steps: Call the family member using a known number
Do not send money based on urgent texts alone
Report the number as impersonation spam
notes_edge_case: Elderly-focused fraud with emotional manipulation.

title: Smoke smell reported near two buildings
report_text: Residents reported smoke odor near two adjacent buildings. Fire services confirmed a small kitchen incident was contained, and there is no ongoing threat.
action_steps: Keep exits clear until the all-clear
Follow verified emergency notices only
Avoid reposting unconfirmed panic messages
notes_edge_case: Emergency-adjacent but resolved; should communicate reassurance.

title: Fake survey link promises reward card
report_text: A post claims a local store is giving reward cards for a quick survey. The link requests full name, phone number, and login verification, which is suspicious.
action_steps: Do not submit personal data to unknown forms
Check the store's official account for confirmation
Warn the community about possible phishing
notes_edge_case: Potential phishing disguised as a promotional offer.

title: Road closure near school during exam hours
report_text: The city issued a traffic advisory for a short road closure near the school entrance during exam drop-off hours. The notice is routine and time-bound.
action_steps: Plan an alternate route
Allow extra travel time
Keep the digest concise and low-stress
notes_edge_case: Non-emergency advisory that still has local relevance.

title: Temporary water disruption in one block
report_text: Maintenance work will temporarily disrupt water supply for a few hours in one block. The notice includes a restart estimate and no safety threat.
action_steps: Store drinking water if needed
Avoid overreacting to a routine maintenance notice
Check the restart window before sharing
notes_edge_case: Useful low-stress maintenance notice.

title: Viral post claims 'mass robbery' with no evidence
report_text: A social post claims a mass robbery happened in the neighborhood, but the post links to unrelated videos, has no time or address, and is being reposted widely.
action_steps: Flag as rumor
Do not surface in main alert feed
Wait for corroborating sources
notes_edge_case: Classic viral misinformation scenario.
